subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-05-09 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: This is the station of outpouring, and it is the propagation of the Cause of God, the diffusion of the fragrances of God, the exaltation of the Word of God, and the promotion of His teachings. This floweth from the Truth unto creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مقامی است مقام افاضه و آن تبلیغ امرالله و نشر نفحات الله و اعلاء کلمة الله و ترویج تعالیم است.  این من الحق الی الخلق است
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
